name: YouTube Analytics
description: Pull channel performance from the YouTube Analytics API: views, watch time, subscribers, retention. Used by the content domain to track which videos earned their reach.
connection: OAuth 2.0 + PKCE with Google. The refresh token lives at ~/.prevail/connectors/youtube-analytics/auth/refresh.token (chmod 600). To set up: register an OAuth client in https://console.cloud.google.com (type: Desktop or Web), add http://127.0.0.1:53782/callback as an authorized redirect URI, set PREVAIL_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID + PREVAIL_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, then run `prevail connectors oauth youtube-analytics`.
